pundit.name: Eric Wynalda
pundit.take: **Mustard Boy, who's leading this disgrace of a pool, thinks Switzerland is a secret powerhouse and picked Czechia like he has a crystal ball, yet he can't see the Grand Canyon-sized gap between Brazil and Haiti.** Brazil's the kind of team that makes even the most clueless fan, like Rafe "The Noisemaker," look like a savant if they somehow get a result. Devin, or should I say "Ghost Pepper," got stuck with Haiti, and I can't help but question if he picked them with his eyes closed, or maybe he thought he was playing a FIFA video game. Let me spell it out for you uninitiated: Brazil will stomp all over Haiti, and they'll do it in style. I've been in locker rooms; this isn't even going to be a contest.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach's Switzerland Dominates While Bosnia Forgets To Show Up
pundit_takes.subtitle: Mustard Boy confirms strategy of only drafting teams that win.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe Poised To Jump To First With Germany In Reserve
pundit_takes.subtitle: The Noisemaker's 15-year-old luck still baffling seasoned managers.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner Relying On Morocco To Break Out Against Undrafted Scotland
pundit_takes.subtitle: Bubba G's confidence higher than Canada's goal count against Qatar.

pundit_takes.headline: Devin Hopes For USA Revival Against Unassuming Australia
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ghost Pepper aiming to spice up his position from fourth place.

rome_analytics_quotes: Zach surged to the top while Gayden watched from the third spot in horror.
Rafe's Tier-1 Germany pick saves him from the draft disaster punchline he deserves.
Devin is Rafe's easy target, eating a 6-point deficit in direct clashes.
Sim love for Gunner faded real fast, thanks to an unpredicted teenage takeover.
